snippet.description:

snippet.description:

Song - Palazzo 2 (Full Video)
Artist - Kulwinder Billa & Shivjot
Feat - Aman Hayer, Himanshi Khurana
Lyrics / Composer - Shivjot
Music - Aman Hayer
Director - Robby Singh

Line Production - Sunny Bhullar
Make Up Artist - Manisha Dhiman
Costume Stylist - Bhupesh Saini
Choreographer - Shanty Kanwar

           || Lyrics ||                       
Kaatal adaavan kudi gun wargi..
Kardi glow firre chann wargi..
Kaatal adaavan kudi gun wargi
Oye Kardi glow firre chann wargi
Hona ae halaak ajj Road Romeo.. (2)
Tenu takk takk ke jo Race maardai..
“Kalla hi ni maan c palazzo sohniyei ni jhanjheran na duggni grace maardai,,
Pehlan hi ni maan c palazzo sohniyei  ni jhanjheran na duggni grace maardai”

Vaal chadde hoye ne loose paya suit tang ni.. 
Gajre tere da tere jeha rang ni.. (2)
Sone te suhaga nakhre te sang ni..
Krda ae kill tera ang ang ni.. 
Thukk teri sohniye donali wargi..
Rohb tera raund jinni thes maardai..
Kalla hi maan c palazzo...

Ho Gaaneyan di list Banayi firdi..
Hathan utte mehndi kudi laaayi firdi.. 
Tikka forehead te sajayi firdi..
Nazran churaundi firre bde chirr di..
Mere sun di aa gaane kal di repeat te
Sune Shivjot kal di repeat te..
O kudi pa ke palazzo nache..
Pa ke palazzo nache desi beat te..
Pa ke Sharara nache Desi beat te
O pa ke palazzo nache desi beat te..

Gore mukh utte aenkan ne kaliyan..
Golden kanna vich payiyan Waliyan.. (2)
Jutti tilledar kade heelan pa liyan..
Ni Munde ki tu kudiyan v piche la liyan..
Gaave jdo Billa Nachdi ae duniya..
litteran wale da dhol base maardai..
Kalla hi ni maan c palazzo sohniyei ni jhanjhera na duggni grace maardai..
Ho kalla hi ni maan c palazzo sohniyei ni Jhanjeran na duggni grace maardai... (2)

snippet.title: Bepanah Pyaar (Official Video) Payal Dev, Yasser Desai | Surbhi Chandna, Sharad Malhotra | Shabbir A
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals brings to you Bepanah Pyaar composed and sung by Payal Dev collaborating up with the talented singer Yasser Desai for the first time. Reuniting after their successful pairing together in Naagin 5, Surbhi Chandna & Sharad Malhotra’s sizzling chemistry is sure make you fall in love with them all over again. This beautiful romantic song has been written by veteran Bollywood lyricist Shabbir Ahmed and Payal Dev.

#VYRLOriginals #SurbhiChandna #SharadMalhotra

Directed by Arif Khan, the stunning video narrates a thrilling story of love, treachery and action with a surprising plot twist in the end. Do comment & mention below your favourite #sharbhi moments from the video.

Ho lokan da tan kam hunda 
Khichniyan lattan jaat apnia sochan nu azaad rakhda
Kehda banda kithe tak karda stand time das dinda time ni lihaj rakhda,
Kam te kalam utte rakheya bharosa khan bhaini wala chez ki a lokan nu a dasna
Gal Sun Makhna , 
Ho Gal sun Makhna Jehra Painda Rakhna , Hove j Mukadran Da time chakna..
Chup nu taka k chaki firde kai feelingan 3-4 Bandeyan da veham chakna Hooooo

Ho gallan vicho kadeyan main tarak bada 
Pali baithe dilan vich harakh bada
Sochde a sale kar jaan gay cross
Hunda ghode te kateedan vich farak bada
Dogle kahaunde jehde karde kharabi a
Pith na takaiye roti jihna nal khadi a
Ho chokan nal hunde ni start mitra ginne chune yaran kol mitran di chabi aa
Hauli Hauli sikhlangay udana v kaka kehnde jamde tan panchi v udaar ni hunde
Haske j kehnde kive o star saab hater hunde a sale yaar ni hunde
Chad de nu dekh jaa k mari de ni chitte aise fame da ki fayda paije thuk k j chatna
Gal sun Makhna...

Ho likhan ale di kadon kadar pai
Geetan vich kali kali sadar pai 
Pith piche kehnde sala vaada geetkar kal ud di hoi kana vich khabar pai
Matlab kad banda gallon j nahi lahi da
Apna bnaun de lai kise da dhai da
Settle hoiye ja na bhavein hoiye mitra 
Pehlan vere bande da stand hona chahida
Bohta v dimag utte pai da ni zor gaane jine k likhe a ohi gaye jaan gay
Kala kala karna release mitra par pehlan bebe bapu nu sunaye jaan gay
Apne valon tan pure likha tun tun change maade ch farak par lokan ne a dasna 
Gal sun Makhna..

Ho lokan da tan kam hunda 
Khichniyan lattan jaat apnia sochan nu azaad rakhda

Kam te kalam utte rakheya bharosa khan bhaini wala chez ki a lokan nu a dasna
Gal Sun Makhna , 
Ho Gal sun Makhna Jehra Painda Rakhna , Hove j Mukadran Da time chakna..
Chup nu taka k chaki firde kai feelingan 3-4 Bandeyan da veham chakna Hooooo

Ho gallan vicho kadeyan main tarak bada 
Pali baithe dilan vich harakh bada
Sochde a sale kar jaan gay cross
Hunda ghode te kateedan vich farak bada
Dogle kahaunde jehde karde kharabi a
Pith na takaiye roti jihna nal khadi a
Ho chokan nal hunde ni start mitra ginne chune yaran kol mitran di chabi aa
Hauli Hauli sikhlangay udana v kaka kehnde jamde tan panchi v udaar ni hunde
Haske j kehnde kive o star saab hater hunde a sale yaar ni hunde
Chad de nu dekh jaa k mari de ni chitte aise fame da ki fayda paije thuk k j chatna
Gal sun Makhna...

Ho likhan ale di kadon kadar pai
Geetan vich kali kali sadar pai 
Pith piche kehnde sala vaada geetkar kal ud di hoi kana vich khabar pai
Matlab kad banda gallon j nahi lahi da
Apna bnaun de lai kise da dhai da
Settle hoiye ja na bhavein hoiye mitra 
Pehlan vere bande da stand hona chahida
Bohta v dimag utte pai da ni zor gaane jine k likhe a ohi gaye jaan gay
Kala kala karna release mitra par pehlan bebe bapu nu sunaye jaan gay
Apne valon tan pure likha tun tun change maade ch farak par lokan ne a dasna 
Gal sun Makhna..

snippet.title: Bharat Bandh on March 26: All you need to know
snippet.description:
Bharat bandh: 26 ਨੂੰ ਕੀ-ਕੀ ਰਹੇਗਾ ਬੰਦ ?
The Samyukta Kisan Morcha, a coalition of farmers’ unions, which has given a call for Bharat Bandh or a countrywide strike on March 26, has appealed to people to make it a success. The strike, in protest against the three contentious farm laws enacted recently, will be observed the entire day tomorrow, from 6 am till 6pm.

#BharatBandh #SamyuktaKisanMorcha #FarmersProtest #PunjabiNews #Punjab #IndiaNews #FarmersProtestUpdate  #Farmers #KisanAndolan #kisanektazindabaad

snippet.title: നാളെ ഹർത്താൽ. പെൻഷൻ വിതരണം തീയതി .ഇങ്ങനെ നാളത്തെ പ്രധാന അറിയിപ്പുകൾ.
snippet.description:
ഈ ചാനലിലൂടെ ഞങ്ങൾ പ്രസിദ്ധീകരിക്കുന്ന വീഡിയോകളിൽ ഒരുതരത്തിലുമുള്ള രാഷ്ട്രീയ,സാമുദായിക, മതപരമായ ഒരു വേർതിരിവുമില്ല. ഗവൺമെന്റ് സ്കീമുകൾ ഏത് നിമിഷവും എപ്പോൾ വേണമെങ്കിലും മാറ്റം സംഭവിക്കാം . ആയതിനാൽ ഞങ്ങൾ പ്രസിദ്ധീകരിക്കുന്ന പുതിയ വീഡിയോ അപ്ഡേഷനുകൾ കാണുവാൻ ശ്രമിക്കുക.

snippet.title: കറണ്ട് ബില്ല്  ഇരട്ടിയാകും.വീട്ടിൽ ഫ്രിഡ്‌ജ്‌  ഉള്ളവർ ശ്രദ്ധിക്കുക.എല്ലാവരും ഉടൻ ഇക്കാര്യം ചെയ്യുക
snippet.description:
കറണ്ട് ബില്ല്  ഇരട്ടിയാകും.വീട്ടിൽ ഫ്രിഡ്‌ജ്‌  ഉള്ളവർ ശ്രദ്ധിക്കുക.എല്ലാവരും ഉടൻ ഇക്കാര്യം ചെയ്യുക 
𝐃𝐢𝐬𝐜𝐥𝐚𝐢𝐦𝐞𝐫📢📢📢
ഈ ചാനലിലൂടെ ഞങ്ങൾ  പ്രസിദ്ധീകരിക്കുന്ന വീഡിയോകളിൽ ഒരുതരത്തിലുമുള്ള രാഷ്ട്രീയ,സാമുദായിക, മതപരമായ  ഒരു വേർതിരിവുമില്ല. ഗവൺമെന്റ് സ്കീമുകൾ ഏത് നിമിഷവും എപ്പോൾ വേണമെങ്കിലും മാറ്റം സംഭവിക്കാം . ആയതിനാൽ ഞങ്ങൾ പ്രസിദ്ധീകരിക്കുന്ന പുതിയ വീഡിയോ അപ്‌ഡേഷനുകൾ കാണുവാൻ ശ്രമിക്കുക👍.

#chrishalmedia

For more latest news and informative updates..

snippet.title: OnePlus 9 Pro 5G Unboxing & First Look - The Perfect Experience #YourBestShot🔥🔥🔥
snippet.description:
Namaskaar Dosto, is video mein maine aapse OnePlus 9 Pro ke baare mein baat ki hai aur share ki hai isi OnePlus 9 Pro Smartphone ki unboxing aur ek first look. OnePlus 9 Pro ek flagship phone hai, jaha is OnePlus 9 Pro mein hai Snapdragon 888 Processor aur yaha 5G bhi available hai aur saath mein hai 8GB/12GB LPDDR5 RAM aur 128GB/256GB UFS3.1 Storage. OnePlus 9 Pro mein hai 6.7" ka QHD+ 120Hz LTPO AMOLED Display adaptive refresh rate ke saath. OnePlus 9 Pro mein ek Quad rear Camera setup hai jaha hai 48MP Primary + 50MP Ultrawide/Macro + 8MP Telephoto Camera jaha hai 3.3x Optical zoom aur 30x digital zoom aur saath hai ek 2MP Mono Camera. OnePlus 9 Pro mein 16MP ka Selfie camera hai aur saath mein 4500mAh ki battery hai Warp Charge 65 65W charging ke saath mein jaha 65W Warp Wireless 50 Charger aur 3W reverse wireless charging. OnePlus 9 Pro mein IP68 protection bhi available hai. Main aapke liye jaldi hi OnePlus 9 Series ka ek surprise leke aane waala hu. Mujhe umeed hai ki aapko OnePlus 9 Pro ki yeh Unboxing aur First Look video pasand aayegi.
 
OnePlus 9 Pro Price in India:
8GB/128GB: 64,999 INR 
12GB/256GB: 69,999 INR

Jio studios and Rusk studios together bring you a finale like never before. A finale where every quest to find the answers reaches its end and where every emotion is all set to get extreme. A perfect mix of drama, comedy, mystery, and love, Dude season finale has an answer to your every question. So stay glued to your screens because this end is a new beginning. Till then stay tuned to Alright for more amazing content: http://bit.ly/alrightsquad​

#DUDES1​ #WebSeries​ #Episode05

Connect with #theAlrightSquad here
FB: https://www.facebook.com/TheAlrightSquad
IG: https://www.instagram.com/thealrightsquad/

Check out all the episodes of DUDE here on the Alright Squad: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6JPnhhI175mKcmfyybatSJIEmzjv5pKB 

Follow our actors here: 
Ambrish Verma: https://www.instagram.com/ambrishverma3011/?hl=en 
Chote Miyan: https://www.instagram.com/iamchotemiyan/?hl=en 
Apoorva Arora: https://www.instagram.com/apooarora/?igshid=du0hvtjh79dn 
Shibani Bedi: https://www.instagram.com/shibani_bedi/?hl=en 

Dude web show Season 1 
If you liked movies like Byomkesh Bakshi, then you would also like the Dude Season 1, Episode05. Dude web show features Shibani Bedi, Ambrish Verma, Apoorva Arora, Chote Miyan, Shibani Bedi, Rakesh Bedi. 

About Ambrish Verma 
Ambrish Verma is a popular digital face that has been featured in various stand-alone episodes and web shows across leading fiction channels like RVCJ, The Timeliners, Hasley India, etc. Ambrish Verma has written sketches like Luckiest Man in the World for Timeliners. DUDE showcases his first directorial and writing marvel. Ambrish Verma also plays the main lead in this new web series. If you like watching the Indian web series and Hindi web series then you would also like to watch Ambrish Verma in Dude. If you like watching Ambrish Verma videos then you should watch the Wrong Number too. Stay tuned to Rusk studios for more such Ambrish Verma videos. 

About Apoorva Arora 
Starring in College Romance, Apoorva Arora is one of the most sought-after faces of YouTube. Dude season 1 is Apoorva’s first web show with Alright (rusk media). If you liked the #wrongnumber, #collegeromance, like dude web show. If you like to watch the Indian web series and Hindi web series then you would also like to watch Apoorva Arora in Dude. Apoorva is featured in many other Ambrish Verma videos as well from RVCJ.

About Chote Miyan 
Chote Miyan or Arun Kushwaha is an Indian actor, comedian, and YouTuber. Chote Miyan is famous for TVF Qtiyapa, Chote Miyan video, and Teen Screen Patti video. Dude web show trailer features Shibani Bedi, Ambrish Verma, Apoorva Arora, Chote Miyan, Shibani Bedi, Rakesh Bedi. If you like to watch the Indian web series and Hindi web series then you would also like to watch Chote Miyan in Dude.

About Shibani Bedi 
Shibani Bedi is a Delhi-based theater and web/TV/film actor and has acted in several viral videos, ad films, short films, done a bunch of stage plays, and short cameos. Shibani is also a voice-over artist and an ex-journalist. 

Why is Dude special for Rusk Studios? 
With a group of bright and hardworking team, Rusk believes in bringing you the most relatable content for free. Dude is a Delhi-based fiction story that we believe needs to be heard and seen by everyone. Dude web show is one of the best Hindi web series 2021, new web series 2021, Indian web series trailer, best web series 2021 similar from the binge, #jiostudios, #Bollywood, webseries, Hindi films, #entertainment, #Maddockfilms. Ambrish Verma videos have always been fav to our audience.

#AmbrishVerma #ApoorvaArora #ChoteMiyan #ShibaniBedi

snippet.title: ALL OK | NO FEAR Ft. Keerthi Rupangudi | New Kannada Song
snippet.description:
No Fear is yet another power-packed, motivational track from All Ok, that empowers everyone out there and pushes you to never let your fears or insecurities give up on your dreams. Whenever you feel scared, Just close ur eyes, smile & say "No fear"

Lyrics,  Concept , Co-Composed, Directed & Performed by
ALL OK

Introducing
Keerti Rupanagudi

D.o.p
Sanketh 

Editing & Vfx 
Akash Rj

Music Arrangement , Production & Co-Composed 
Ayush Raj 

Co-Written lyrics -
Pramod Marvante

Additional programming , Mixing & Mastering
Ba55ick 


Art Direction
Shivakumar J

Poster design
Ashwin

(ಪಲ್ಲವಿ)

ಇಂದೊ ನಾಳೆಯೊ ನಾ ಗೆದ್ದೆ ಗೆಲ್ಲುವೆ
ಅಂದುಕೊಂಡರೆ  ಈ ಜಗವು ನಿನ್ನದೆ

ನೀ ಪಣವನು ತೊಡು
ಹಿಂಜರಿಕೆಯ ಬಿಡು
ನೀನೊಂದು ಸೈನ್ಯವೆ

ನಿ ಶ್ರಮವನು ಪಡು
ಛಲದಿ ಹೆಜ್ಜೆಯಿಡು
ನೀನೊಂದು ಜ್ವಾಲೆಯೆ

Rap bit

neee naditiru naditiru 
novannella maretiru ,
sneha preeti shanti anno manastidi kalitiru

chalavanu bidadadiru ,  banda daari maridiru
aaga yella bhesh antare ninna bagge kuritu


sahane talme preeti aagali ninna jeevanadasti
jayabheri inda rana kahale oodu galisi olle keerthi 
 


( ಚರಣ )

ನಿನ್ನನೀ ಗೆದ್ದು ನೋಡು 
ಸಿಡಿದ್ದೆದು ನಿಂತು ಬಿಡು
ಮುನ್ನುಗ್ಗಿದಾಗ್ಲೆ ಗೆಲ್ಲೋಕೆ ಸಾಧ್ಯ ನೀನು ಜಗವಾ

ಹಣೆಬರಹ ಚೇಂಜು ಮಾಡು 
ಭಯವೆಲ್ಲಾ ಪಕ್ಕಕ್ಕಿಡು
ಕಣ್ಣಲ್ಲೆ ಇರಿಸು ಎಂದು ನಿನ್ನ ಹಠವಾ

ನಿನ್ನೆಯ ಮರೆತು ಬಿಡು
ನಾಳೆಯೆ ಕಡೆಗೆ ನೋಡು
ಅವಕಾಶ ಸಿಕ್ಕಾಗ್  ಯೂಸು ಮಾಡು ಎಲ್ಲಾ ಬಲವಾ

ಬಂದದ್ದು ಬರಲಿ  ಬಿಡು
ನಿನ್ನ ನೀ ನಂಬಿ ಬಿಡು 
ಬೆವರಿನ ಹನಿಯೆ ಕಾಣೋದೆಂದು ಗೆಲುವಾ

ಸಾಧ್ಯವಿಲ್ಲ ಅನ್ನೋದೆ ಇಲ್ಲ 
ನಿನ್ನ ಕೈಲಿ ಆಗೋದಿಲ್ಲ ಅನ್ನೋರೇ ಎಲ್ಲ 
ನೆನಪಿರೊ ಸೋಲನು ಸೋಲಿಸುವ ಗೆಲುವಿಗೆ
ಸಾಧನೆ ಎಂದು ಹೆಸರಲ್ಲವೇ 


ಸಾಧ್ಯವಿಲ್ಲ ಅನ್ನೋದೇ ಇಲ್ಲ 
ನುಗ್ಗು ನುಗ್ಗು ಮುಂದೆ ನಿಂಗೆ ಯಾರೂ ಬೇಕಾಗಿಲ್ಲ ,
ಗುರಿ ಕಡೆ ಓಡುತಿರು , ನೋವನೆಲ್ಲಾ ಮರೆತಿರು , ಬಿದ್ದ ಕಡೆ 7ವುದೆ ಗೆಲುವಲ್ಲವೇ



Follow All Ok on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/all_ok_official/
TikTok: https://vm.tiktok.com/C8JbYs/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/iamallok
Sharechat: https://sharechat.com/profile/yaakinge
Twitter: https://twitter.com/allok02

Don't forget to subscribe to the official YouTube channel of All Ok:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCUwSeY7lUdZSP0vuflq1oPA

Email:- sync-india@believedigital.com

snippet.title: ढेर सारी परतों वाली कुरकुरी मावा गुजिया । Layered Mawa gujiya recipe | Sweet Mawa Karanji Recipe
snippet.description:
layered gujiya recipe, sweet karajni, mawa karanji, gujiya banane ka tarika, gujiya kaise banti hai, gujiya banane ki vidhi, gujiya, recipe in hindi, mawa gujiya recipe, gujiya recipe video, gujiya ki recipe
#GujiyaRecipe #SweetKaranji #IndianSweets #FestivalRecipe
Ingredients for
Layered Mawa Gujiya
For Dough:
Refined Flour - मैदा - 1 Cup (150 grams)
Desi Ghee - घी - 1 tbsp

For Stuffing:
Mawa - मावा - 1/2 Cup (100 gms)
Almond Flakes - बादाम कतरन - 1 tbsp
Cashews - काजू - 1 tbsp, chopped
Charoli Seeds - चिरोंजी - 1 tbsp
Dry Coconut - नारियल - 1/4 Cup, grated
Raisins - किशमिश - 1 tbsp
Semolina - सूजी - 2 tbsp
Desi Ghee - घी - 1 tsp
Sugar Powder - चीनी पाउडर - 1/2 Cup (70 grams)
Cardamom - इलाइची - 6, coarsely ground

For Sata:
Desi Ghee - घी - 1.5 tbsp
Cornflour - कॉर्नफ्लोर - 2 tbsp


Subscribe for more recipes - 
http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=nishamadhulika

For the Best recipes on YouTube, log onto - 
http://www.youtube.com/nishamadhulika


Find us on Facebook at - 
https://www.facebook.com/nishamadhulika

Visit my Hindi Website
http://nishamadhulika.com

Watch your favorite serials Free on Sun NXT, immediately after TV. Offer Valid till 25th Apr 2021

Poove Unakkaga is a drama serial on Sun TV. Poovarasi and Keerthy share a heart-warming bond of friendship and hope to stay friends forever. Now Poovarasi makes a promise to her mother, that she won’t fall-in-love with anyone, but often dreams about a mysterious man. By a stroke of fate, he happens to be Kathir, a rich handsome young man who falls in love with Keerthy at first sight. Watch this refreshing tale of love and friendship to know more.

Watch the Latest Promo of popular Tamil Serial #PooveUnakkaga that airs on Sun TV.

Watch your favorite serials Free on Sun NXT, immediately after TV. Offer Valid till 25th Apr 2021

Poove Unakkaga is a drama serial on Sun TV. Poovarasi and Keerthy share a heart-warming bond of friendship and hope to stay friends forever. Now Poovarasi makes a promise to her mother, that she won’t fall-in-love with anyone, but often dreams about a mysterious man. By a stroke of fate, he happens to be Kathir, a rich handsome young man who falls in love with Keerthy at first sight. Watch this refreshing tale of love and friendship to know more.

snippet.title: Suez Canal blocked after huge container ship wedged across it  - BBC News
snippet.description:
A giant container ship the length of four football pitches has become wedged across Egypt's Suez Canal, blocking one of the world's busiest trade routes.

Dozens of vessels are stuck, waiting for rescue boats to free the 400m-long (1,312ft) ship, which was knocked off course by strong winds.

Egypt has reopened the canal's older channel to divert some traffic until the grounded ship can move again.

Please subscribe HERE http://bit.ly/1rbfUog

#BBCNews

snippet.title: Stuck at sea: Cargo ship wedged in Suez Canal causes traffic jam
snippet.description:
Tug boats and a digger are struggling to free a mega cargo ship, blocking one of the world's busiest shipping pathways.

Dozens of ships are stuck because a container ship almost half a kilometre long is wedged across the waterway.

snippet.title: OnePlus 9 Pro Durability Test! - Who is Hasselblad?!
snippet.description:
Its time to durability test the new OnePlus 9 Pro. With their giant Hassleblad camera. Grab your Robot Camo from channel sponsor dbrand HERE: https://www.dbrand.com/robot-camo The OnePlus 9 Pro is a mainstream android device nowadays. And with that the OnePlus 'Flagship Killer' days are over. Its officially a flagship, with flagship prices. The OnePlus 9 Pro is a worthwhile competitor in the smartphone flagship space. A smart phone that is a tempting upgrade. OnePlus is dropping 150 million dollars into their camera partnership with Hasselblad. What do you think they'll come out with next? 

Learn more about Hasselblad's involvement with the Apollo Missions: https://www.hasselblad.com/inspiration/history/500-series/

Get my razor knife here! https://www.jerryrigknife.com/

Ronny's lie of working for his 'Chacha', the MLA has come true. He now sets his sights on fighting the Parshad (Councilor) Election. However, when Chachaji makes it clear that the ticket will stay with the present Parshad, Ronny spins a new lie. But a formidable new rival threatens his dreams.

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता का उल्टा चशमाह - Episode 757 - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Zfu1x9Bd1UqLwUxhZ1oBJh

The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Kasa-e-Dil | Episode 21 | Best Scene 06 | HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Kasa-e-Dil | Episode 21 | Best Scene 06 | HAR PAL GEO

Subscribe to our channel so you never miss any of your favorite dramas https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Kasa-e-Dil narrates a compelling story of two cousins, Hatim and Somia who have grown to like each other since childhood and are waiting to be united however Hatim?s mother is against their relationship and hates Somia. Soon the death of Somia?s father changes the course of things and Somia?s aunt makes sure to cause misunderstandings between Hatim and Somia

Meanwhile, a young and handsome businessman, Adan hailing from a respectable family falls in love with Somia at first sight however he is unable to express his feelings. Somia?s aunt who is already against Somia begins to defame her by involving Adan?s name. Somia's situation worsens when Hatim steps back leaving Somia all alone. Out of love for Somia, Adan agrees to accept her however he himself is tangled in a complicated relationship. Will Adan be able to give Somia the place she deserves in his house or will Adan surrender to the wishes and obligations of his family?

Writer: Jahanzeb Qamar

Director: Zeeshan Ahmed

Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi

Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

CAST :

Hina Altaf
Affan Waheed
Komal Aziz Khan
Sukaina Khan
Rabia Noreen
Noor Ul Hassan
Fazila Qazi
Rabia Noreen
Zainab Qayyum
Ali Ansari
Haris Waheed
Mariyam Noor
Birjees Farooqui
Touqeer Ahmed Paul

snippet.title: Navneet Rana : Arvind Sawant यांनी धमकी प्रकरणावर संसदेत दिलं खुलं आव्हान | Sachin Vaze | Param Bir
snippet.description:
🔴लॉ़ग इन करा: https://www.mumbaitak.in/
शिवसेना खासदार अरविंद सावंत यांनी आपल्याला धमकी दिल्याचा आरोप खासदार नवनीत राणा यांनी केला होता. यासंदर्भात त्यांनी लोकसभा अध्यक्षांकडे तक्रार दाखल केली. त्यानंतर पंतप्रधान नरेंद्र मोदी आणि अमित शाहांकडेही तक्रार केली. दोन दिवस या प्रकरणावर शांत असलेले अरविंद सावंत काल संसदेत बोलले. माझ्यावर आरोप करणाऱ्यांचा इतिहास तपासा, संसदेच्या गॅलरीमधील सीसीटीव्ही फेटज तपासा आणि या प्रकऱणाची चौकशी करा अशी मागणीच त्यांनी केली. 
---------
इंडिया टुडेच्या मुंबई तक या मराठी युट्यूब चॅनलवर आपलं स्वागत. इंडिया टुडे ग्रुपचे मॅगझिन, इंडिया टुडे टीव्ही आणि आज तक हे लोकप्रिय न्यूज चॅनल आपल्याला माहितीच आहे. त्यानंतर आता खास मराठी प्रेक्षकांसाठी आपण भारतीय प्रादेशिक भाषेतलं पहिलं मराठी चॅनल घेऊन आलोय. महाराष्ट्रासह राष्ट्रीय आणि आंतरराष्ट्रीयस्तरावरील महत्वाच्या बातम्या आणि घडामोडी आपल्याला अगदी सोप्या शब्दांत समजावण्याचा आमचा प्रयत्न असणार आहे.

localized.description:
🔴लॉ़ग इन करा: https://www.mumbaitak.in/
शिवसेना खासदार अरविंद सावंत यांनी आपल्याला धमकी दिल्याचा आरोप खासदार नवनीत राणा यांनी केला होता. यासंदर्भात त्यांनी लोकसभा अध्यक्षांकडे तक्रार दाखल केली. त्यानंतर पंतप्रधान नरेंद्र मोदी आणि अमित शाहांकडेही तक्रार केली. दोन दिवस या प्रकरणावर शांत असलेले अरविंद सावंत काल संसदेत बोलले. माझ्यावर आरोप करणाऱ्यांचा इतिहास तपासा, संसदेच्या गॅलरीमधील सीसीटीव्ही फेटज तपासा आणि या प्रकऱणाची चौकशी करा अशी मागणीच त्यांनी केली. 
---------
इंडिया टुडेच्या मुंबई तक या मराठी युट्यूब चॅनलवर आपलं स्वागत. इंडिया टुडे ग्रुपचे मॅगझिन, इंडिया टुडे टीव्ही आणि आज तक हे लोकप्रिय न्यूज चॅनल आपल्याला माहितीच आहे. त्यानंतर आता खास मराठी प्रेक्षकांसाठी आपण भारतीय प्रादेशिक भाषेतलं पहिलं मराठी चॅनल घेऊन आलोय. महाराष्ट्रासह राष्ट्रीय आणि आंतरराष्ट्रीयस्तरावरील महत्वाच्या बातम्या आणि घडामोडी आपल्याला अगदी सोप्या शब्दांत समजावण्याचा आमचा प्रयत्न असणार आहे. 
Namskar, Welcome to India Today group’s new Marathi YouTube channel – Mumbai Tak. Get all the latest important stories and updates from in and around Maharashtra in Marathi. snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता का उल्टा चशमाह - Episode 758 - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SAB TV Channel: https://www.youtube.com/user/sabtv?sub_confirmation=1

Click to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7Zfu1x9Bd1UqLwUxhZ1oBJh

The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

Brown Town Music Presents New Haryanvi Song of 2021 Teekhe Nain By Jassa Dhillon Ft Baani Sandhu From His Debut Album Above All.

Track Credits:
Track Name:  Teekhe Nain
Artist : Jassa Dhillon Ft Baani Sandhu
Music : Gur Sidhu
Mixing & Mastering: B Saanj 
Lyrics: Jassa Dhillon
Instagram Reels: Boss Music Productions
Lyrical Video: The Creative Grooves
Producer: Nav Sandhu

Teekhe Nain Lyrics:


Tikhe nain kataara aali ,
Kache dood na chori paali , 
ghote barga nasha sa chargya ,
dil pa la ka rakho taali,

Tikke nain kataara aali, 
kache dood na chori paali chori paali,
 
Har gaam ma rukka pargya, 
chora ek baat pa argya ,
 tanne jaan jaan jo bola ,
Aade gurgaun te bhirgya , 
tere khatar latth  bjaaye , 
na tu hi  kare na bye ,
Lachak machk teri sandel kaali , 
shaam kahe toh leju baali ,
 gani kasooti bangar vaali , 
Tikhe nain katara aali , 
kaache dhood na chori paali
 
 Tere yaar ki puri chacha ha , 
arre 100000 toh din ka kharcha ha ,
teri beuty uper la dyu ga , 
ye bade zigar ka larka ha ,
 kaache na karta kaam , 
kra dyu kahe toh chakka jaam ,
Jo b aa shareaam , 
yo chora  bilkul na badnaam
 Bade bhai ki choti saali , 
lambi gardan nazuk daali , 
dil pa la ka rakho taali ,
nain katara aali ,
kaache dhood na chori paali , 
tikkhe nain ktara aali ,
 
 
Ik baat maane batlaade ,
tere kitne lafde  chala ha ,
 manne bera lagya ,
naam tere pa datte hoye b halla ha,
arre Lafdya ki toh  baat shod,
yo new e challe jayege ,
Par tere piche piche toh ham,
 aakhri dam tak aayege ,
 Piche piche kyana ghume , 
baat toh kar jo karni ha , 
choti moti baat nahi,
 yo ka pyaar ki lambi journey ha
 Pehli baar na hue diwaane 
 maane ga bhar k harjaane ,
jeb ha khooli  loot khjaane
 siddi tu koi baat na maane  
Pyaar karuga bahrka  thali ,
kanna ma diomand ki baali , 
jaata ki toh roj diwaali,
 
 
Tikkhe nain ktara aali , kache dhood na chori paali ,
 
 
Itna Dabka challe ha , 
tere pure g se hojege , 
tanne Taj mahal b le dya ge,
jab pise e pise hojege ,
 
 
Shehr k gunde yaar k paali ,
arre kurti b tane tang sewali , 
arre barsega bass pittal khalli.

snippet.title: Barrister Babu | बैरिस्टर बाबू | Episode 226 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Fuming with rage, Bondita stops the post-wedding rituals of Anirudh and ask him why he married Manorama. Watch the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode and find out more.
#ColorsTV #BarristerBabu

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

In a bid to save an 8-year-old girl from becoming the victim of Sati, Anirudh marries a curious and tyrant girl Bondita. At a time when women education was considered sinful, Anirudh educates Bondita and makes her the first “Barrister Babu” of their region. Will their imperfect marriage turn into a successful relationship? Will Anirudh succeed in his mission to gain independence for the women in his country?

snippet.title: 🔴-LIVE-മമ്പുറം സ്വലാത്ത് തത്സമയം 25 - 03 - 2021 I 07:10 pm
snippet.description:
MAMPURAM MAQAM SWALATH MAJLIS I11 - 03-2021
#mampurammaqam#swalath#live


മമ്പുറം മഖാമിലേക്ക് സ്വാഗതം .ദക്ഷിണേന്ത്യയിലെ പ്രധാന തീർത്ഥാടന കേന്ദ്രമാണ് മമ്പുറം മഖാം. മലപ്പുറം ജില്ലയിലെ തിരൂരങ്ങാടി താലൂക്കിൽ,  സ്ഥിതി ചെയ്യുന്ന മഖാം ശരീഫിൽ അന്ത്യവിശ്രമം കൊള്ളുന്നത് കേരളീയ മുസ്‌ലിം ചരിത്രത്തിലും അധിനിവേശ വിരുദ്ധ പോരാട്ടങ്ങളിലും ശ്രദ്ധേയ സാന്നിധ്യമായിരുന്ന ഖുഥ്ബുസ്സമാൻ സയ്യിദ് അലവി ബിൻ മുഹമ്മദ് ബിൻ സഹ്ൽ മൗലദ്ദവീല തങ്ങളും കുടുംബാംഗങ്ങളുമാണ്. യമനിലെ ഹള്‌റമൗത്തിൽ നിന്ന് ഇസ്‌ലാമിക പ്രബോധനാവശ്യാർത്ഥം മലബാറിലെത്തുകയും പിന്നീട് ഇവിടത്തെ മത-സാമൂഹിക-രാഷ്ട്രീയ മേഖലകളിൽ ശക്തമായ ഇടപെടലുകൾ നടത്തുകയും ചെയ്ത അദ്ദേഹത്തിന്റെ ആത്മീയ തണൽ തേടി ജീവിത കാലത്തെന്ന പോലെ ജാതി-മത ഭേദമന്യെ അനേകായിരം തീർത്ഥാടകർ ഇവിടെ ഇപ്പോഴും എത്തിച്ചേരുന്നു.മമ്പുറം മഖാമിൽ നടക്കുന്ന പ്രധാന ചടങ്ങുകളിലൊന്നാണ് വ്യാഴാഴ്ച സ്വലാത്ത്.  മമ്പുറം തങ്ങളുടെ അമ്മാവനും ഭാര്യാപിതാവുമായ സയ്യിദ് ഹസൻ ബിൻ അലവി ജിഫ്‌രി തങ്ങളുടെ വിയോഗാനന്തരം മമ്പുറം തങ്ങൾ സ്ഥാപിച്ചതാണ് ഈ സ്വലാത്ത് മജ്ലിസ്.  
നേര്‍ച്ചകള്‍ക്കും സംഭാവനകള്‍ക്കും ബന്ധപ്പെടുക :
 91 9656310300 (Help Line) , 
+91 9996 313 786 , 
0494 2460 575, 
0494 2464 502 (Darul Huda).

Google Pay സൌകര്യം ലഭ്യമാണ്:
Number: +91 9996 313 786

snippet.description:
Aaj main aapko South ki famous Neyyappam recipe share karne wali hoon, khane mein soft, phule phule aur kafi majedar recipe hai, aur isse hum bina soda aur bina maida ke banane wale hain …ekdum Authentic aur perfect tarike se …Summer Recipe /Holi Special …
Doston Agar aapko meri yeah Recipe Pasand aaye toh…LIKE aur SHARE... Karna Nahi Bhule aur Latest Recipe Update ke Liye.. Subscribe Karein ..aur Bell Icon Press Kare…Free!

snippet.description:
Omkar reveals to Mayura that she is no longer required in the house to take care of Tara and throws her out of the house. Watch the sneak peek of the forthcoming episode and find out more.
#ColorsTV #PinjaraKhubsurtiKa

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 23 March 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara’s birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can’t tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

snippet.title: Bicycle Bhais | Web Series | Episode 2 | Engine Out Completely | Popcorn Stories
snippet.description:
Bicycle Bhais | Malayalam Comedy Web Series | Episode 2 | Popcorn Stories 
 
Plot

The story revolves completely around the backdrop of a beautiful village and its innocent people. There is a two-wheeler workshop, owned by Suresh. His staff Podiyan known as Podimon , Kichu who introduces himself as the bike tester of the shop, but a lazy bum, in reality, Pappan the village drunkard who believes the workshop as his gin joint is the main characters and the story revolves around their friendship, joy, petty quarrels, arguments, blunders, and happiness along with other villagers. The entire plot and the characters will be enframed in Basheerian style, the village library, teashops, Toddyshop,  milk society, etc. Bindu is the wife of Suresh. She is a normal housewife. The couple doesn't have children, but they are adjusted to the fact and live happily. Bindu is a part of Suresh and his friend's group and their happiness Bicycle Bhais generally aims to present a village story with all its innocence in its visuals, characters, situations, and storyline.

snippet.title: Bepanah Pyaar (Official Teaser) Payal Dev, Yasser Desai| Surbhi Chandna, Sharad Malhotra | Shabbir A
snippet.description:
Hold on tight & fasten your seat-belts, this story is going to take you on an unexpected journey, where love knows no limits. VYRL Originals brings to #BepanahPyaar in the soulful voice of Payal Dev and Yasser Desai. Starring the popular duo from Naagin 5 - Surbhi Chandna & Sharad Malhotra who reunite for this love story, with music by Payal Dev and lyrics penned by Shabbir Ahmed and Payal Dev, the music video has been directed by Arif Khan, releasing on the 24th of March 2021 at 11AM.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

snippet.title: Ananda Bhavan Episode 54, 25/03/2021 | #VikatanPrimeTime
snippet.description:
Vallamai Tharayo - https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLKcGe9BTHkrqU79qB4wJs4mOXjM3AzdBg
Ananda Bhavan was a popular serial produced by Vikatan Televistas and aired on Sun TV. Ananda Bhavan portrays the story of a family which runs the hotel named “Ananda Bhavan”. The story revolves around the sufferings and the trials of the family in running the hotel. After Akshaya, #VikatanPrimeTime brings Ananda Bhavan to you!

The old-fashioned story theme of mother-in-law versus daughter-in-law, malice exchanges between the father and the eldest son-in-law, sisters-in-law who refuse to go to their in-laws place even after marriage. The character of the brother who is loving and caring towards his parents and wife are some of the back stories which form the crux of the story for this TV serial. Ananda Bhavan was aired at 9 PM on all weekdays on Sun TV. The cast of Anand Bhavan included Chetan, Delhi Kumar, Satchu, Vanaja, Anand and many more.

20 years back, in the first week of November 1998, Vikatan Televistas started their journey with a weekly serial Akshaya on SUN TV, every Thursday at 9 pm. It has been 20 years of entertaining you - our audience. We thank you for your support, love and criticism all these years. #20YearsOfVikatanTelevistas
Kolangal revolves around the lives of four siblings; the eldest daughter is the main protagonist. It relates the story of these children whose mother taught them to always be straightforward in life.
Subscribe: https://goo.gl/QiBz7h Vikatan App - http://bit.ly/2QvUBTD

snippet.title: നടന്‍ വിജയകുമാറിന്റെ സംഭവബഹുലമായ ജീവിതകഥ l Vijayakumar Life Story
snippet.description:
മലയാളത്തിൽ ഏതാനും ചെറിയ കഥാപാത്രങ്ങൾ ചെയ്ത പ്രശസ്ത ചലച്ചിത്ര നടനാണ് വിജയകുമാര്‍.1990 കള്‍ മുതല്‍ സിനിമയില്‍ സജീവമായ താരം നൂറിലധികം മലയാലം സിനിമകളില്‍ അഭിനയിച്ചിട്ടുണ്ട്. നായകന്റെ കൂടെയും വില്ലനായുമൊക്കെ പല സിനിമകളിലും താരം പ്രത്യക്ഷപ്പെട്ടിട്ടുണ്ട്. ആദ്യം നായകനായും പിന്നീട് വില്ലനായും തുടരുകയായിരുന്നു താരം. ചെറിയ വേഷങ്ങളാണ് ചെയ്തതെങ്കിലും അതെല്ലാം ശ്രദ്ധേയമായിരുന്നു. താരത്തിന്റെ മുഖം കണ്ടാൽ തിരിച്ചറിയാൻ തക്ക രീതിയിലായിരുന്നു അദ്ദേഹത്തിന്റെ അഭിനയമെന്നു തീർത്തും പറയാം. അത്ര നല്ല കഥാപാത്രങ്ങൾ താരത്തിന് ലഭിച്ചു. പ്രൊഡ്യൂസര്‍ എസ് ഹെന്‍ഡ്രിയുടെയും ലിസിയുടെയും മകനായി തിരുവനന്തപുരത്ത് ജനിച്ചു. അഭിനയത്തില്‍ മാത്രമല്ല എഡിറ്റിംഗ് രംഗത്തും നിര്‍മ്മാണത്തിലും വിജയ്കുമാര്‍ സജീവമായിരുന്നു. ഇവിടെ എല്ലാം തന്നെ താരത്തിന്റെ കഴിവ് നമ്മൾ കണ്ടതാണ്.

#Vijayakumar #Binu #actress #Actor #ArthanaBinu
